content.text: Transportation planning in SAP TM aligns freight demand, available resources, and cost constraints to ensure efficient and compliant movement execution.

content.title: Exam Tip
content.text: Focus on planning sequence order and master-data dependencies for scenario-based questions.

items: Capture freight demand from ERP or external systems
Balance service level agreements against freight cost

content.text: The entities below are foundational in planning and appear repeatedly in both implementation and certification assessments.

content.caption: Conceptual planning flow from demand to execution.

content.title: Common Failure Point
content.text: Incomplete location and business partner master data can invalidate planning proposals.

items: Validate location master and hierarchy assignment
Verify resource and carrier availability windows
Confirm charge profile and planning profile linkage
